allFiringBeginnerGuide.title: All Firing Beginner Guide
allFiringBeginnerGuide.intro: Start with tutorial completion, one stable team, and focused upgrades to avoid wasting early materials.

steps.title: Finish tutorial and claim rewards
steps.description: Unlock menus, collect launch mail, and redeem available codes.

steps.title: Build one primary team of three
steps.description: Use one carry, one sub DPS, and one support to keep combat flow consistent.

steps.title: Spend materials on core trio only
steps.description: Do not spread upgrades across the full roster in the first sessions.

steps.title: Explore side paths in each map
steps.description: Hidden routes and puzzle nodes provide extra progression resources.

allFiringTierList.title: All Firing Tier List
allFiringTierList.intro: This launch ranking focuses on early progression value, team fit, and stability in story and boss clears.

tiers.name: Rozeul
tiers.description: Reliable carry with strong early damage and low setup needs.

tiers.name: Sion
tiers.description: Flexible support with consistent value across team styles.

tiers.name: Felgia
tiers.description: Steady sustained DPS with good long-fight performance.

allFiringRerollGuide.title: All Firing Reroll Guide
allFiringRerollGuide.intro: Reroll when you want a stronger launch account with fast early progression and safer story clears.

steps.title: Complete tutorial and open summons
steps.description: Reach mail, events, and summon access before deciding to reroll.

steps.title: Claim launch rewards before pulling
steps.description: Use all free tickets and reward currency in one pass.

steps.title: Target Rozeul plus support value
steps.description: Rozeul with Sion creates a practical start for most accounts.

steps.title: Keep runs with stable team direction
steps.description: Prioritize account consistency over one narrow high-roll outcome.

allFiringCharactersGuide.title: All Firing Characters Guide
allFiringCharactersGuide.intro: Meet the launch companions by affinity and role so you can build clearer three-character teams for story progression and boss stages.

allFiringTeamBuildingGuide.title: All Firing Team Building Guide
allFiringTeamBuildingGuide.intro: Use role balance, switch rhythm, and element coverage to make your three-character lineup stable across story, bosses, and event fights.

items.name: Basic Three-Character Core
items.description: Main DPS plus support or sub DPS and a flexible third slot for utility or survivability.

items.name: Rozeul + Sion Starter Core
items.description: Use Rozeul for primary Thunder damage and Sion to maintain pressure between swaps.

items.name: Dual-Wind Progression Setup
items.description: Pair Felgia and Sion for steady Wind pressure, then add a carry for stage-specific damage.

items.name: Ice Burst Setup
items.description: Ilscha plus Nayeh provides stronger burst windows when investing into Ice-focused builds.

items.name: Fire Coverage Flex
items.description: Kirika can slot into mixed teams whenever Fire coverage is needed for a stage.

items.name: Survival-Friendly Lineup
items.description: Add Herfwin as the third slot when you need safer clears and stronger frontline stability.

allFiringCombatGuide.title: All Firing Combat Guide
allFiringCombatGuide.intro: Learn the core battle flow: positioning, attack chaining, real-time switching, and ultimate timing for cleaner clears.

steps.title: Enter with a Balanced Team
steps.description: Start with one damage dealer, one support slot, and one flexible safety slot for smoother early clears.

steps.title: Use Movement Before Long Combos
steps.description: Position first with movement and jumps, then commit to attack strings once the lane is safe.

steps.title: Chain Normal Attacks into Skills
steps.description: Use normal attacks to maintain pressure, then convert into skills for stronger burst windows.

steps.title: Switch Characters in Real Time
steps.description: Swap between teammates to keep combo flow, avoid bad matchups, and bring in the right role.

steps.title: Read Enemy Attack Patterns
steps.description: Watch telegraphs, move early, and avoid standing still after skill use to reduce avoidable damage.

steps.title: Save Ultimates for Hard Moments
steps.description: Use ultimate skills for bosses or dangerous waves instead of spending them on weak enemies.

steps.title: Explore Stage Routes While Clearing
steps.description: Check side paths, puzzle objects, and hidden spots for extra rewards that accelerate progression.

allFiringDownloadLaunchGuide.title: All Firing Download and Launch Guide
allFiringDownloadLaunchGuide.intro: Use official store pages and channels for downloads, compatibility checks, and launch update tracking.

rows.note: Download from Google Play and confirm device compatibility before install.
Install from the App Store; iOS 12.0 or later and iPadOS 12.0 or later are required.
App Store compatibility supports macOS 11.0 or later on Apple Silicon devices.
Use MuMuPlayer and install All Firing through Google Play inside the emulator.
All Firing launched globally on May 14, 2026 for Android and iOS.
Follow the official website and communities for events, support, and patch notices.

faq.title: All Firing Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Core answers for All Firing players during launch progression

questions.question: Is All Firing available on iOS and Android?
questions.answer: Yes. All Firing is available on both iOS and Android through official stores.

questions.question: How do I redeem All Firing codes?
questions.answer: Open Settings, go to Account, select Redeem Code, then claim rewards from mailbox.

questions.question: Is rerolling in All Firing required?
questions.answer: No. Rerolling is optional, but it helps if you want a stronger launch start.

questions.question: What is the best first All Firing team setup?
questions.answer: Use one main DPS, one sub DPS, and one support to keep early clears consistent.

questions.question: Where can I follow All Firing updates?
questions.answer: Use the official website, Discord, and social channels for event and patch news.

cta.title: Ready to Join All Firing?
cta.description: Follow official All Firing channels for events, updates, and community discussions.
